dataValidation.prompt: <<==When deleting the row, point the cursor at the row number to highlight the entire row, then right click on "Delete".
Pls write the child's full name as Surname, First Name

dataValidation.error: Birthdate should not be later than the current date
Date should not be later than the current date
dataValidation.prompt: Pls write the actual date when the child was weighed

dataValidation.error: The number you entered is outside the expected weight range.
dataValidation.prompt: Pls enter the weight in kilograms

dataValidation.error: The number you entered is outside the expected height range.
dataValidation.prompt: Pls write the height in centimeters
